name: Gas Room
description: This is a small enclosed chamber filled with the sharp, unmistakable smell of coal gas. The air here feels managed rather than safe, as though containment was prioritized over comfort. A short set of stairs leads upward, away from the worst of it, while a narrow tunnel runs east into darker workings. Lying exposed on the floor is a sapphire-encrusted bracelet, left behind in a place where lingering was clearly discouraged.
